segments.text: Oh come, let us sing to the LORD;
let us make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let us come into his presence with thanksgiving; let us make a joyful noise to him with songs of praise!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the LORD is a great God, and a great King above all gods.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: In his hand are the depths of the earth; the heights of the mountains are his also.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: the strength…: or, the heights of the hills are his

segments.text: The sea is his, for he made it, and his hands formed the dry land.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: The sea…: Heb. Whose the sea is

segments.text: Oh come, let us worship and bow down; let us kneel before the LORD, our Maker!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For he is our God, and we are the people of his pasture, and the sheep of his hand.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Today, if you hear his voice, do not harden your hearts, as at Meribah, as on the day at Massah in the wilderness,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: when your fathers put me to the test and put me to the proof, though they had seen my work.
For forty years I loathed that generation and said, 'They are a people who go astray in their heart, and they have not known my ways.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Therefore I swore in my wrath, 'They shall not enter my rest.'
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: that…: Heb. if they enter into my rest
